name: Web Intl Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the CustomIntlProvider contract (#1054) in a real browser: one provider hands back Intl.Collator / DateTimeFormat / NumberFormat / RelativeTimeFormat for a requested locale, so an app gets locale-aware collation, date, number, and relative-time formatting through one swappable seam. The contract is type-only (intl/contract.ts); the Intl.* runtime provider + customIntl swap registry are impl in Frontier UI, so the demo supplies its own in-demo provider (a thin pass-through to the platform Intl.* constructors). A runtime-conformance section asserts each invariant live across locales: locale-aware collation, accent-insensitive compare, localized date + currency formatting, relative-time formatting, and a fresh formatter per call.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the CustomIntlProvider contract (#1054). One provider hands back Intl.Collator / DateTimeFormat / NumberFormat / RelativeTimeFormat for a requested locale, so an app gets locale-aware formatting through one swappable seam.

In-demo provider, not the FUI impl

The contract is type-only (intl/contract.ts); the Intl.* runtime provider + the customIntl swap registry are impl in Frontier UI. So this demo supplies its own in-demo provider — a thin pass-through to the platform Intl.* constructors — to prove the contract is realizable.

Verified contract

The runtime-conformance section asserts each invariant live: locale-aware collation (German ä), accent-insensitive compare, localized long-month + currency formatting, relative-time formatting, and a fresh formatter per call.
